productContext: SaaS product that automates shared mailbox triage, routing, follow-up, and customer operations for SMB teams.
direction: Notion and Stripe inspired, but more colorful and workflow-state driven.
sourceMode: Opinionated example created from user permission to invent missing decisions.
frameworkPolicy: Tailwind CSS utility conventions only; component-framework agnostic.

tailwindExport.artifactPolicy: Generated under tmp/pif/export; do not commit unless intentionally integrating a copy into the product.

demo.artifactPolicy: Generated under tmp/pif/demo; do not commit unless intentionally integrating a copy into the product.

checks: No square-bracket placeholders in generated markdown.
No unresolved Local Decisions Required sections.
Tailwind export builds with latest stable Tailwind.
Demo contains sidebar navigation and section examples generated from structured data.
